zh: 有些父母因爲白天上班無法陪孩子、
en: Some parents, busy at work during the day,
feel the urge to make up for lost time,

zh: 在下班吃過晚餐後、儘量陪孩子玩、
en: and play with the child as much as possible after dinner.

zh: 但像跑、跳、捉迷藏等刺激而活動量大的活動應避免、
en: But running, jumping, hide-and-seek — all intense, stimulating activities — should be avoided,

zh: 因為會使孩子因興奮而無法入睡、
en: because the excitement keeps them from falling asleep,
or leaves them in a half-sleep state,

zh: 而在半夜突發尖叫嚎哭或坐起來、
en: waking in the middle of the night with screams or sudden upright wakings.
and once the child is fully awake,
